---
title: "Comparison with SLAMMER (speed)"
bibliography: references.bib
page-navigation: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Placeholder

This page will report runtime comparisons between pySLAMMER and the legacy SLAMMER program for the equivalent-linear coupled analysis — the case where SLAMMER's $O(n^2)$ inner loop is replaced by an $O(n)$ formulation in pySLAMMER. Headline result: a speedup of roughly two orders of magnitude on the bundled motion suite, with no loss of accuracy (see the [SLAMMER results comparison](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd) for the equivalence study).

Sections to come: rigid analysis comparison, flexible analysis (linear elastic), and flexible analysis (equivalent linear).
:::
